# VVIP Operations Checklist: Sarah Chen

## Gold Tier Protocol -- Meridian Health Systems

---

**Visitor:** Sarah Chen, CIO, Meridian Health Systems
**VVIP Tier:** Gold
**Briefing Date:** TBD
**Location:** Raleigh Executive Briefing Center
**Room:** Executive Suite
**Executive Sponsor:** Maria Torres, VP Engineering
**EBC Coordinator:** Assigned at scheduling

---

## Pre-Briefing (T-14 days to T-1 day)

### Stakeholder Notifications (T-14 days)

- [ ] **Notify Executive Sponsor** -- Maria Torres (mtorres@redhat.com)
  - Confirm sponsor drop-in at 11:15 AM (coffee format)
  - Brief on overdue AI governance commitment and current pipeline
  - Share talking points document
  - Confirm Maria's calendar hold
- [ ] **Notify Account Team** -- Confirm presenter roster and backup assignments
- [ ] **Notify EBC Operations** -- Submit Gold VVIP briefing request with full protocol requirements

### Room & Facilities (T-7 days)

- [ ] **Book Executive Suite** -- Full day, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM
- [ ] **Verify room setup:**
  - Boardroom configuration for morning sessions
  - Whiteboard or digital whiteboard available (Sarah prefers interactive formats)
  - Laptop station for hands-on lab (1:30 PM session)
  - AV system tested for presentations
  - Power outlets and charging stations accessible
- [ ] **Book hands-on lab environment** -- Pre-configured OpenShift AI instance
- [ ] **Confirm backup room** -- In case of scheduling conflict or AV issues

### Catering (T-7 days)

- [ ] **Dietary requirements confirmed:** Vegetarian
- [ ] **Beverage preferences confirmed:** Green tea, sparkling water
- [ ] **Submit catering order:**
  - 8:30 AM -- Vegetarian breakfast spread (pastries, fruit, yogurt), green tea service, sparkling water
  - 10:00 AM -- Break refresh: green tea, sparkling water, light vegetarian snacks
  - 11:15 AM -- Coffee service for sponsor drop-in (green tea for Sarah, coffee for Maria Torres)
  - 12:30 PM -- Executive vegetarian lunch (plated or high-quality buffet), green tea, sparkling water
  - 2:30 PM -- Afternoon refresh: green tea, sparkling water, light snacks
- [ ] **Confirm catering vendor** has received vegetarian specifications
- [ ] **Verify no cross-contamination risks** in catering prep

### Welcome & Materials (T-3 days)

- [ ] **Personalized welcome display** -- Configured for lobby screen and Executive Suite entry
  - Format: "Welcome, Sarah Chen, Meridian Health Systems"
  - Include Meridian Health Systems logo (approved version)
- [ ] **Print materials packet:**
  - Briefing agenda (printed, bound)
  - AI governance reference architecture document
  - Edge computing reference architecture
  - OpenShift AI platform roadmap summary
  - Hands-on lab guide
- [ ] **Prepare digital materials** -- USB drive or secure sharing link with all presentation materials
- [ ] **Verify all presenter materials** are finalized and reviewed

### Presenter Preparation (T-3 days)

- [ ] **Distribute presenter briefing packets** -- Include executive dossier, talking points, and do's/don'ts
- [ ] **Brief all presenters on communication style:**
  - Direct and data-driven; avoid marketing language
  - High technical depth -- she is a former developer
  - She tracks commitments; do not make promises that cannot be kept
  - She will ask probing questions; prepare for deep technical Q&A
- [ ] **Conduct dry run** for AI governance session (highest priority session)
- [ ] **Confirm lab environment** is tested and stable

### Gift (T-3 days)

- [ ] **Select Gold tier-appropriate gift**
- [ ] **Gift wrapping and presentation card** prepared
- [ ] **Confirm gift is available** on briefing day

### Final Confirmation (T-1 day)

- [ ] **Send agenda to Sarah** (she prefers 48-hour advance distribution)
- [ ] **Confirm Sarah's travel arrangements** (flight from Minneapolis)
- [ ] **Verify all room bookings** are still active
- [ ] **Verify catering order** is confirmed and scheduled
- [ ] **Test AV equipment** in Executive Suite
- [ ] **Test hands-on lab environment** -- full end-to-end walkthrough
- [ ] **Confirm presenter availability** -- all confirmed with backups identified
- [ ] **Print final attendee badges** if required
- [ ] **Charge backup laptop** for lab session

---

## Day-of Operations

### Pre-Arrival (7:30 AM - 8:30 AM)

- [ ] **EBC Manager arrives by 7:30 AM** -- Room walkthrough and final setup check
- [ ] **Verify welcome display** is active on lobby screen and suite entry
- [ ] **Verify catering setup** -- Breakfast spread, green tea, and sparkling water in place
- [ ] **Place printed materials** at Sarah's seat
- [ ] **Test AV one final time** -- Ensure all presentations load correctly
- [ ] **Confirm first presenter** (AI governance team) is on-site and prepared

### Lobby Greeting (8:15 AM - 8:30 AM)

- [ ] **EBC Manager positions at lobby** by 8:15 AM
  - Sarah arrives early; be ready ahead of schedule
- [ ] **Greet Sarah by name** at lobby entrance
- [ ] **Escort to Executive Suite** -- Direct route, no waiting
- [ ] **Offer beverage on arrival** -- Green tea or sparkling water
- [ ] **Introduce to any waiting team members**

### During Briefing

- [ ] **Monitor catering timing:**
  - 10:00 AM -- Break refresh delivered
  - 11:15 AM -- Coffee/tea service for sponsor drop-in
  - 12:30 PM -- Lunch service begins
  - 2:30 PM -- Afternoon refresh
- [ ] **Sponsor drop-in at 11:15 AM:**
  - [ ] Text Maria Torres at 11:00 AM to confirm she is en route
  - [ ] Ensure coffee and green tea are set up in meeting area
  - [ ] Have talking points printed for Maria
- [ ] **Monitor session timing** -- Keep agenda on track; Sarah values punctuality
- [ ] **Be available for ad-hoc requests** -- Water refills, printing, tech support
- [ ] **Lab session (1:30 PM):**
  - [ ] Confirm laptop station is powered and logged in
  - [ ] Solutions Architect is ready at 1:20 PM
  - [ ] Backup environment credentials are accessible

### Gift Presentation (3:45 PM -- during wrap-up)

- [ ] **Present gift** during the wrap-up session
- [ ] **Include personalized note** from EBC Manager

### Departure

- [ ] **EBC Manager escorts Sarah to lobby** at conclusion
- [ ] **Confirm any follow-up logistics** (e.g., materials to be sent, next meeting)
- [ ] **Thank Sarah for her time and SAB contributions**

---

## Post-Briefing (T+1 day to T+14 days)

### Immediate Follow-up (T+1 day)

- [ ] **Send thank-you note** -- From Maria Torres (sponsor) AND EBC Manager
  - Personalize with specific references to briefing discussions
  - Acknowledge her contributions and leadership
- [ ] **Send digital copies** of all materials discussed
- [ ] **Log briefing in engagement history** -- CRM entry with full session notes

### Commitment Tracking (T+2 days)

- [ ] **Document all commitments** made during briefing with owners and deadlines:
  - AI governance architecture: final delivery date
  - Customer reference introductions: scheduled within 2 weeks
  - OpenShift AI production proposal: timeline confirmed
  - Edge computing next steps: scoped
  - Any new commitments from individual sessions
- [ ] **Send commitment summary to Sarah** for alignment
- [ ] **Create follow-up tasks in CRM** for each commitment

### Engagement Updates (T+7 days)

- [ ] **Update engagement score** in CRM (target: maintain or improve from 92)
- [ ] **Update relationship stage** assessment
- [ ] **Brief Maria Torres** on briefing outcomes and next steps
- [ ] **Schedule next touchpoint** with Sarah (within 2 weeks of briefing)

### NPS & Feedback (T+3 days)

- [ ] **Send NPS survey** to Sarah
- [ ] **Target score:** 9/10 or higher (matching Sept 2025 briefing)
- [ ] **Log feedback** and distribute to presenter team

### Pipeline Updates (T+7 days)

- [ ] **Update opportunity stages** in CRM:
  - OPP-19283 (AI Platform Expansion, $1.2M) -- update stage based on briefing outcome
  - OPP-20114 (Edge Computing, $800K) -- update stage based on briefing outcome
- [ ] **Schedule follow-up meetings** for any opportunities that advanced

---

## Protocol Reference: Gold VVIP Tier

| Element | Requirement | Status |
|---------|-------------|--------|
| Room | Executive Suite or Premier Boardroom | Required |
| Lobby Greeting | EBC Manager meets at lobby | Required |
| Catering | Executive level | Required |
| Sponsor Drop-in | Required (coffee format preferred) | Required |
| CEO Drop-in | Optional -- request if schedule permits | Optional |
| Gift | Tier-appropriate | Required |
| Welcome Display | Personalized | Required |
| Thank-you Note | From Sponsor + EBC Manager | Required |
| Materials | Printed + digital | Required |
